_doc: Ramulator2 v2.1 LPDDR5_6400 saturated-streaming BW cross-check. efficiency = achievable / max_theoretical (single x16 channel); eff_BW = 51.2 * efficiency (scaled onto the 64-bit spec peak; LPDDR5 has no pseudochannel doubling so efficiency transfers).
honesty: simulated (Ramulator2 v2.1 LPDDR5_6400 streaming), NOT silicon
